text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. I was recalling the
experiences I had during my time off.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I went for a light jog as a form of
self-maintenance...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Then, I encountered a carnivorous mammal
walking in the park—in other words, a dog.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it thought we were similar with how I
normally follow you around. It wouldn't leave me
alone at all.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Due to this, I was able to enjoy petting its fluffy
coat. That action resulted in the successful
revitalization of my physical and mental
wellbeing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It really was so incredibly fluffy. Just remembering
it makes my heart feel fuzzy as well.

It looks like experiencing some puppy therapy
refreshed her in both mind and body!
